response.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<upi:ReqBalEnq xmlns:upi="http://npci.org/upi/schema/">
  <Head ver="1.0" ts="{{now}}" orgId="DEMOPSP" msgId="{{randomValue type='UUID'}}"/>
  <Txn id="BAL001" type="BalEnq" ts="{{now}}">
    <RespBalEnq>
      <Resp result="SUCCESS" errCode="">
        <Bal>
          <Data type="TOTAL">
            <settAmount>50000.00</settAmount>
            <settCurrency>INR</settCurrency>
          </Data>
        </Bal>
      </Resp>
    </RespBalEnq>
  </Txn>
</upi:ReqBalEnq>
